text.message: I guess I cant get my brick back right red?
Its ok. I tried at least
how am I the rob lol
The only brick in the world?
If you dont get it not my problem
So you want to move the robber on me?
do you really think im the strongest?
didn't produce single card for 3 orbs and got robbed twice
blue just ask for a trade
solo rob this early is rude
literally the weakest out of all the cities
But he is crying here over a block
why make an enemy so early blue
Its strategy black. I dont have anything with you
when you play more ranked games you will realize that solo blocking early is suboptimal
I tried to be polite with you but you are arrogant now:)))
also red just has by far the best setup
but no, black u keep robbing me
Red let black talk. He thinks he is the only one who knows how to play catan
5 points, 2 cities but he is weak:)))))
you have 5 points and a dev blue
Don’t pull me into this weird argument
You blocked us when was clearly black lol
but im the strongest cause I have 5 roads down
blue at what point do you come to your senses
this is why you dont slow rob early. It allows other players to get ahead
Red is gonna take army at this rate
the 11 sheep block does nothing blue
please take this as a lesson guys, the strong ore wheat player is the rob early on
might be a dev record red haha
no one trading u win here blu
